    Returns the value of the active record component.

    Adds a new employee.

    Adds a new employee to the in-memory list.
    addEmployee(String, String, String, boolean) - Method in class com.project.dao.JdbcEmployeeDao
    Adds a new employee to the database.
    addInventoryItem(InventoryItem) - Method in class com.project.dao.InventoryDAO
    Inserts a new inventory item into the database.
    addInventoryItem(String, int) - Method in class com.project.dao.InventoryDAO
    Convenience overload used by the manager controller to add a default consumable inventory item.
    addInventoryItem(String, String, int) - Method in class com.project.dao.InventoryDAO
    Inserts a new inventory item with a specified type.
    addManagerRole(int, String) - Method in class com.project.dao.EmployeeAuthDao
    Adds the manager role to an employee.
    addMenuItem(MenuItem) - Method in class com.project.dao.MenuDAO
    Adds a new menu item to the database.
    addMenuItem(String, double, int) - Method in class com.project.dao.MenuDAO
    Adds a new menu item with the specified parameters.
    addMenuItemReturningId(String, double, int) - Method in class com.project.dao.MenuDAO
    Inserts a menu item and returns the new item ID, or -1 on failure.
    addOrderItem(int, int, String, int, double, double) - Method in class com.project.dao.OrderDAO
    Deprecated.
    Use OrderDAO.placeOrder(double, String, List) for transactional inserts.

    Adds an item to the order cart.

    Called after the controller is wired to show any pending notification.

    Clears all session data, including the current user, cart contents, selected category, and notification message.

    Clears all items from the order cart.

    E

    Employee - Class in com.project.model
    Represents an employee in the system.

    Constructs an employee with a specified ID, name, and role.

    Constructs an employee with a specified ID, name, PIN, and active status.

    Z

    ZReportDAO.AlreadyGeneratedTodayException - Exception Class in com.project.dao
    Exception thrown when attempting to generate a Z-report that has already been generated for the current day.
    ZReportDAO.PaymentTotal - Class in com.project.dao
    Represents payment totals aggregated by payment method.
